name: SHELF FILL
conditioned_path: haul unboxing videos that show a shelf slowly populating with a set
mechanic: Tap floating items one at a time to place them onto a shelf grid. Each item lands with a soft click and the shelf fills left-to-right, top-to-bottom. When the last slot is filled the shelf glows gently and the session ends — a finite set, completely yours.
video_trick: calm completion — the shelf full at last

name: SET SNAP
conditioned_path: gacha unboxing where each pull dangles the missing piece of the set
mechanic: Tap to draw a card from a no-cash deck of 12. Each new card snaps into a visible set grid; duplicates highlight in red so you feel the missing slots. Pull until the full set is complete — the deck has a bottom and every slot fills.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the last card snapping into place

name: GRID COMPLETE
conditioned_path: bingo / collection-tracker grids that keep one square empty forever
mechanic: A 5x5 grid of soft-colored tiles sits on screen, most dim. Tap a tile to light it; tiles light in a hidden unlock order revealed one hint at a time. Fill all 25 and the grid ripples once and holds — done, no new tiles, no infinite expansion.
video_trick: calm completion — every cell finally lit

name: TYPE DEX
conditioned_path: Pokédex / trading-card completionist feeds that dangle the one card you don’t have
mechanic: Silhouettes of 20 creatures drift across the screen; tap each type icon that matches the silhouette to capture it. Capture all 20 and the dex seals with a satisfying full-roster flash. Each captured entry is free, and the roster has exactly 20.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the dex 100% filled

name: GARDEN GROW
conditioned_path: plant-collection and seed-haul videos that always tease the next species
mechanic: Tap soil patches to plant seeds; each tap costs one water drop from a finite daily jar. Seeds sprout into one of 10 plant species displayed on a completion bar. When all 10 species are grown the garden is full and the session closes peacefully.
video_trick: calm completion — the garden finished, nothing more to add

name: STICKER BOOK
conditioned_path: sticker-collection hauls and blind-pack openings that sell the incomplete album
mechanic: Sticker tiles flutter in one at a time; tap each to peel and place it on the correct blank in the album spread. No duplicates, no blank that never fills. When the last sticker lands the album shuts with a soft snap and the session ends.
video_trick: calm completion — the full album, finally sealed

name: COLOR SET
conditioned_path: palette-collection content where creators unbox every shade of a makeup line
mechanic: Swatches drift across the canvas; tap each one to add it to a growing palette row. The palette has exactly 16 slots — one per hue in the spectrum. Fill the row left to right and the completed rainbow palette glows softly and holds still.
video_trick: calm completion — the full spectrum, side by side

name: STAMP RALLY
conditioned_path: loyalty-stamp cards and punch-card FOMO that dangle the free reward one stamp away
mechanic: Stamp icons appear one at a time on a 3x3 card; tap each before it fades to claim it. Stamp all 9 to redeem the card and see the full set revealed. The card has exactly 9 slots and the deck is finite at 3 cards total — 27 taps and it’s done.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the final stamp, the card complete

name: MINERAL HUNT
conditioned_path: rock and crystal unboxing hauls that tease the missing specimen in a collection
mechanic: Tap to chip a tile off a stone face; each chip reveals a fragment of a mineral specimen. Chip enough to identify it and it adds to a display case of 8 specimens. Find all 8 types and the case locks with a complete collection badge. No infinite pull, just 8 hidden minerals.
video_trick: reveal bait — what mineral is hiding under this rock?

name: HAUL UNPACK
conditioned_path: unboxing haul videos where each item is revealed with mounting anticipation
mechanic: A box sits on screen; swipe down to open the flap and an item reveals with a pop animation. Each item goes straight to a visible collection shelf. The box contains exactly 10 items, no random-rare gatekeeping. Open all 10 and the haul is complete.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the shelf full after the last item

name: PATCH BOARD
conditioned_path: merit badge and achievement patch boards where the empty slots are always visible
mechanic: A board shows 12 patch outlines. Small missions drift across the screen as simple one-tap prompts; completing each earns a patch that fills the corresponding outline. No timers, no grinding. Fill all 12 and the board is yours, complete.
video_trick: calm completion — the board full, no empty outlines

name: SPECIES LOG
conditioned_path: bird-watching and wildlife photography posts that tease a life-list never finished
mechanic: Silhouette cards drift past like sightings; tap each silhouette you recognize to log it in a field guide of 15 species. Each logged species fills a page in a finite guide. When all 15 pages are filled the guide closes and the session ends.
video_trick: calm completion — the life-list closed, nothing missing

name: NO-CASH GACHA
conditioned_path: gacha and loot-box content that dangles pulls behind paywalls and rates
mechanic: Tap the capsule to spin a free pull; every pull is guaranteed unique from a set of 15 collectibles shown in a tracker. Duplicate protection means each tap makes progress. The 15th pull fills the tracker and the machine locks — complete, no premium currency, no infinite loop.
video_trick: variable reward with a guaranteed end — the pull that completes it

name: COMPLETION METER
conditioned_path: progress bars on social profiles that sit at 85% and itch for one more action
mechanic: A progress bar shows a collection at 80% complete. Scattered collectibles fall across the screen; tap each to add it to the bar. The bar climbs to 100%, the collectibles stop falling, and the meter seals with a final ding. 100% is reachable in under 2 minutes.
video_trick: near-perfection itch — the meter at 95% screams for one more tap

name: VAULT SORT
conditioned_path: collection organization and sorting videos where chaos becomes order
mechanic: A pile of 18 collectible tiles tumbles onto the screen; drag each into the matching labeled vault slot. No timer, no score — just the satisfaction of every item in its place. When the last tile slots in the vault door closes softly and the session ends.
video_trick: calm completion — the vault organized and sealed

name: RARE CATCH
conditioned_path: rare-find hunting content where creators tease the one item that completes a set
mechanic: Items fall fast across the screen; tap only the ones matching the “missing” highlight shown at the top to add them to your set tracker. Common items are decoys. Catch all 6 rare targets and the tracker fills to 100%. A fixed session of 90 seconds and exactly 6 rares hidden in the stream.
video_trick: rare reveal — the moment the missing piece appears

name: RECIPE SET
conditioned_path: recipe collection and cookbook hauls where one dish is always missing from the repertoire
mechanic: Ingredient tiles drift across the screen; tap each one to add it to a recipe card. Each full recipe card unlocks and files into a recipe book with 8 slots. Fill the book’s 8 recipe slots and the book snaps shut — a finite, free, completable cookbook.
video_trick: calm completion — the recipe book full and filed

name: BADGE COLLECT
conditioned_path: achievement badge walls on apps that always show the one badge you haven’t earned
mechanic: 10 badge outlines glow on a board. One badge lights up live; tap it to claim it before it dims. Claim it and it fills permanently. Badges light in sequence but with random timing. Claim all 10 and the board shines complete — no new badge ever appears.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the last badge claimed, the board full

name: MAP PIN
conditioned_path: travel map collection content where every new pin signals a place you haven’t been
mechanic: A simple world-map outline sits on screen with 12 destination circles unmarked. Small destination cards drift in; tap each card then tap its matching circle on the map to pin it. Pin all 12 and the map holds the complete set — every pin placed, the journey closed.
video_trick: calm completion — every pin placed, the map full

name: DECK BUILD
conditioned_path: trading-card deck-building content that dangles the one card completing your strategy
mechanic: Cards slide in one at a time from a shuffled draw pile of 20. Tap each to add it to your hand or discard; fill a 10-card deck with one of each type shown in a tracker. The draw pile has exactly 20 cards — no infinite pack, no premium pulls. Complete the deck and it snaps face-up in a full-set spread.
video_trick: completion-satisfaction — the full deck laid out
